Description: Regenerative Sap — the sap of ancient trees flows through the target, restoring vitality.
DescriptionEn: Regenerative Sap — the sap of ancient trees flows through the target, restoring vitality.
DescriptionFr: Sève Régénératrice — la sève des arbres anciens irrigue la cible, restaurant sa vitalité.
DescriptionEffects: Resets its active effects; heals the targeted ally for 120 HP.
DescriptionEffectsEn: Resets its active effects; heals the targeted ally for 120 HP.
DescriptionEffectsFr: Réinitialise ses effets actifs ; soigne l'allié ciblé de 120 PV.
